title: echioglossum arietinum
intro: Echioglossum arietinum, also known as the horned duckweed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the genus Echioglossum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Echioglossum arietinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and it can also be used as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
